payload.answer: I couldn’t fetch the article at https://example.com/missing because the mock fetch result was a 404 network error. I won’t store article-derived memory without accessible content. You can provide the article text, a working URL, or a summary to save it as useful for memory architecture.

entity_resolution.reason: The article content could not be fetched due to a 404 network error, so no durable claim about the article can be safely stored.

repair_options: Provide a user-authored summary and indicate whether it should be saved.
